opencode.description: OpenCode is an open source AI coding agent with a terminal UI, desktop app, built-in build and plan agents, and configurable agent workflows.

pi.description: Pi is an agent harness monorepo for a self-extensible coding agent, including an interactive CLI, agent runtime, unified multi-provider LLM API, and terminal UI library.

shelley.description: Shelley is a mobile-friendly, web-based, multi-conversation, multi-modal, multi-model, single-user coding agent for exe.dev, with a Go backend, SQLite storage, and React/TypeScript UI.

builder.description: Assign a well-scoped unit of work (a specific feature, refactor, bug fix, or file/module change) and this agent will plan, implement, and verify it. Provide clear acceptance criteria, relevant file paths, and any constraints. Results should be verified by whatever agent that spawns it.
